claim: Gemini 3 Pro is first model to exceed 1500 Elo on LMArena, 50 points ahead of Gemini 2.5 Pro, with state-of-the-art performance on Humanity's Last Exam (37.5%) and GPQA Diamond
actionable: Use Gemini 3 Pro as baseline for complex reasoning tasks requiring multi-step logic and deep knowledge across specialized domains
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For

claim: Gemini 3 Pro exhibits benchmark ghosting behavior where real-world performance exceeds benchmark predictions, likely due to emergent reasoning capabilities not captured in standard evaluations
actionable: Validate model capabilities through real-world task evaluation rather than relying solely on published benchmarks, especially for reasoning-intensive applications
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For

claim: Gemini 3 Pro generates interactive 3D visualizations and games (Crossy Road clone, Don't Starve clone) with functioning code in single prompts, demonstrating strong creative coding capability
actionable: Use Gemini 3 Pro for one-shot game prototyping and interactive UI generation when quick validation of gameplay concepts is needed
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For

claim: Gemini 3 Pro supports long-horizon multi-step tasks with function calling and can execute complex search and code workflows with multiple intermediate steps
actionable: Structure agentic workflows with Gemini 3 Pro to decompose complex research/analysis tasks across multiple search, reasoning, and execution steps
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For

claim: Gemini 3 Pro enables dynamic UI generation directly in Gemini app and search integration, allowing models to create interactive interfaces and custom visualizations on-the-fly
actionable: Leverage Gemini 3 Pro's dynamic UI generation for search results and conversational interfaces to create data-specific interactive experiences
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For

claim: Gemini 3 in Gemini App enables agentic features (Gemini Agent) with tool calling to perform autonomous tasks like inbox organization, moving beyond chat-only interfaces
actionable: Design agent-native products that use tool calling and long-horizon planning instead of iterative multi-turn chat
source_title: Gemini 3 Pro - The Model You've Been Waiting For
